description: Transfer data from or to a server using URLs, supporting numerous protocols

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: The URL to fetch or send data to

arguments.name: Abstract Unix Socket
arguments.description: Connect through an abstract Unix domain socket instead of the network

arguments.name: Alt-Svc Cache File
arguments.description: Enable alt-svc parser with optional cache file

arguments.name: Any Auth
arguments.description: Automatically pick the most secure authentication method

arguments.name: Append
arguments.description: Append to target file instead of overwriting on upload

arguments.name: AWS SigV4
arguments.description: Use AWS V4 signature authentication

arguments.name: Basic Auth
arguments.description: Use HTTP Basic authentication

arguments.name: CA Native
arguments.description: Use the OS native CA store for certificate verification

arguments.name: CA Certificate
arguments.description: CA certificate file to verify the peer

arguments.name: CA Path
arguments.description: Directory of CA certificates to verify the peer

arguments.name: Client Certificate
arguments.description: Client certificate file (and optional password)

arguments.name: Cert Status
arguments.description: Verify server certificate status via OCSP stapling

arguments.name: Cert Type
arguments.description: Type of the client certificate (PEM, DER, ENG, PROV, P12)

arguments.name: Ciphers
arguments.description: Cipher suites to use for TLS 1.2 and earlier

arguments.name: Compressed
arguments.description: Request compressed response and decompress automatically

arguments.name: Compressed SSH
arguments.description: Enable SSH compression

arguments.name: Config File
arguments.description: Read curl arguments from a config file

arguments.name: Connect Timeout
arguments.description: Maximum time in seconds for connection phase

arguments.name: Connect To
arguments.description: Connect to alternative host:port for given host:port

arguments.name: Continue At
arguments.description: Resume transfer at given byte offset, or '-' for automatic

arguments.name: Cookie
arguments.description: Send cookies or read cookies from file

arguments.name: Cookie Jar
arguments.description: Write cookies to file after transfer

arguments.name: Create Dirs
arguments.description: Create necessary local directories for output

arguments.name: Create File Mode
arguments.description: File mode (octal) for remotely created files

arguments.name: CRLF
arguments.description: Convert LF to CRLF in uploads

arguments.name: CRL File
arguments.description: PEM file with Certificate Revocation List

arguments.name: Curves
arguments.description: Colon-separated list of TLS curves to use

arguments.name: Data
arguments.description: Send data in a POST request

arguments.name: Data ASCII
arguments.description: Alias for --data

arguments.name: Data Binary
arguments.description: Post data exactly as specified with no processing

arguments.name: Data Raw
arguments.description: Post data without special interpretation of @

arguments.name: Data URL-encode
arguments.description: Post data with URL-encoding applied

arguments.name: Delegation
arguments.description: Set Kerberos delegation level

arguments.name: Digest Auth
arguments.description: Use HTTP Digest authentication

arguments.name: Disable Config
arguments.description: Disable use of curlrc config file

arguments.name: Disable EPRT
arguments.description: Disable EPRT and LPRT for active FTP

arguments.name: Disable EPSV
arguments.description: Disable EPSV for passive FTP

arguments.name: Disallow Username in URL
arguments.description: Exit with error if URL contains a username

arguments.name: DNS Interface
arguments.description: Network interface for outgoing DNS requests

arguments.name: DNS IPv4 Address
arguments.description: Bind to specific IPv4 address for DNS requests

arguments.name: DNS IPv6 Address
arguments.description: Bind to specific IPv6 address for DNS requests

arguments.name: DNS Servers
arguments.description: Comma-separated list of DNS servers to use

arguments.name: DoH Cert Status
arguments.description: Verify DoH server certificate status via OCSP stapling

arguments.name: DoH Insecure
arguments.description: Skip DoH server certificate verification

arguments.name: DoH URL
arguments.description: DNS-over-HTTPS server URL for hostname resolution

arguments.name: Dump CA Embed
arguments.description: Write embedded CA bundle to stdout and quit

arguments.name: Dump Header
arguments.description: Write received protocol headers to specified file

arguments.name: ECH
arguments.description: Specify how to do ECH (Encrypted Client Hello)

arguments.name: EGD File
arguments.description: Deprecated: path to Entropy Gathering Daemon socket

arguments.name: Engine
arguments.description: OpenSSL crypto engine to use

arguments.name: ETag Compare
arguments.description: Make conditional request using ETag from file

arguments.name: ETag Save
arguments.description: Save HTTP ETag from response to file

arguments.name: Expect100 Timeout
arguments.description: Max seconds to wait for 100-continue response

arguments.name: Fail
arguments.description: Fail silently on HTTP errors (4xx and above)

arguments.name: Fail Early
arguments.description: Fail and exit on first transfer error

arguments.name: Fail With Body
arguments.description: Return error on HTTP errors but still save response body

arguments.name: False Start
arguments.description: Use TLS false start during handshake

arguments.name: Follow
arguments.description: Follow HTTP redirects using the custom request method set with --request

arguments.name: Form
arguments.description: Emulate form submission with multipart/form-data

arguments.name: Form Escape
arguments.description: Use backslash-escaping for form field and file names

arguments.name: Form String
arguments.description: Form field value as literal string (no @ or < interpretation)

arguments.name: FTP Account
arguments.description: FTP account data for ACCT command

arguments.name: FTP Alternative to User
arguments.description: Command to send if USER and PASS fail on FTP

arguments.name: FTP Create Dirs
arguments.description: Create missing remote directories for FTP/SFTP

arguments.name: FTP Method
arguments.description: Method to reach a file on FTP server

arguments.name: FTP PASV
arguments.description: Use passive mode for FTP data connection

arguments.name: FTP Port
arguments.description: Use active FTP mode with given address/interface

arguments.name: FTP PRET
arguments.description: Send PRET command before PASV/EPSV

arguments.name: FTP Skip PASV IP
arguments.description: Do not use IP suggested by server in PASV response

arguments.name: FTP SSL CCC
arguments.description: Shut down SSL/TLS after FTP authentication

arguments.name: FTP SSL CCC Mode
arguments.description: Set CCC mode for FTP SSL

arguments.name: FTP SSL Control
arguments.description: Require SSL for FTP login only, not data transfer

arguments.name: GET
arguments.description: Use GET request with --data options appended as query string

arguments.name: Glob Off
arguments.description: Disable URL globbing with {} and []

arguments.name: Happy Eyeballs Timeout
arguments.description: Timeout in ms for Happy Eyeballs IPv6 head-start

arguments.name: HAProxy Client IP
arguments.description: Set client IP in HAProxy PROXY protocol v1 header

arguments.name: HAProxy Protocol
arguments.description: Send HAProxy PROXY protocol v1 header

arguments.name: Head
arguments.description: Fetch headers only

arguments.name: Header
arguments.description: Extra header to include in the request

arguments.name: Help
arguments.description: Show help for a subject, category, or option

arguments.name: Host Pub MD5
arguments.description: 32 hex digit MD5 of remote host public key for SFTP/SCP

arguments.name: Host Pub SHA256
arguments.description: Base64 SHA256 of remote host public key for SFTP/SCP

arguments.name: HSTS
arguments.description: Enable HSTS with optional cache file

arguments.name: HTTP 0.9
arguments.description: Accept HTTP version 0.9 responses

arguments.name: HTTP 1.0
arguments.description: Use HTTP version 1.0

arguments.name: HTTP 1.1
arguments.description: Use HTTP version 1.1

arguments.name: HTTP 2
arguments.description: Use HTTP/2

arguments.name: HTTP 2 Prior Knowledge
arguments.description: Use HTTP/2 directly without HTTP/1.1 upgrade

arguments.name: HTTP 3
arguments.description: Attempt HTTP/3 with fallback to earlier versions

arguments.name: HTTP 3 Only
arguments.description: Use HTTP/3 only, no fallback

arguments.name: Ignore Content Length
arguments.description: Ignore Content-Length header in HTTP responses

arguments.name: Insecure
arguments.description: Skip SSL certificate verification

arguments.name: Interface
arguments.description: Perform operation using specified network interface

arguments.name: IP TOS
arguments.description: Set IP Type of Service or Traffic Class

arguments.name: IPFS Gateway
arguments.description: Gateway URL for IPFS and IPNS URLs

arguments.name: IPv4
arguments.description: Request only IPv4 addresses when resolving hostnames

arguments.name: IPv6
arguments.description: Request only IPv6 addresses when resolving hostnames

arguments.name: JSON
arguments.description: Send JSON data in a POST request with appropriate headers

arguments.name: Junk Session Cookies
arguments.description: Discard session cookies read from file

arguments.name: Keepalive Count
arguments.description: Max TCP keepalive probes before dropping connection

arguments.name: Keepalive Time
arguments.description: Seconds idle before sending keepalive probes

arguments.name: Key
arguments.description: Private key filename for TLS/SCP/SFTP

arguments.name: Key Type
arguments.description: Type of the private key file

arguments.name: Known Hosts
arguments.description: Known hosts file for SCP/SFTP host verification

arguments.name: KRB Level
arguments.description: Deprecated: enable Kerberos authentication with level

arguments.name: Libcurl Output
arguments.description: Write libcurl C code equivalent of the operation to file

arguments.name: Limit Rate
arguments.description: Maximum transfer rate (e.g. 200K, 3m, 1G)

arguments.name: List Only
arguments.description: List FTP directory with names only (NLST)

arguments.name: Local Port
arguments.description: Preferred local port number or range (FROM-TO)

arguments.name: Location
arguments.description: Follow HTTP redirects

arguments.name: Location Trusted
arguments.description: Follow redirects and pass credentials to all hosts

arguments.name: Login Options
arguments.description: Login options for server authentication (IMAP/POP3/SMTP)

arguments.name: Mail Auth
arguments.description: SMTP authentication address for relayed messages

arguments.name: Mail From
arguments.description: SMTP sender address

arguments.name: Mail RCPT
arguments.description: SMTP recipient address (repeatable for multiple)

arguments.name: Mail RCPT Allow Fails
arguments.description: Continue SMTP even if some recipients fail

arguments.name: Manual
arguments.description: Display the full help text

arguments.name: Max File Size
arguments.description: Maximum file size to download (e.g. 100K, 2.6M)

arguments.name: Max Redirs
arguments.description: Maximum number of redirects to follow

arguments.name: Max Time
arguments.description: Maximum time in seconds for each transfer

arguments.name: Metalink
arguments.description: Deprecated: previously specified a Metalink resource

arguments.name: MPTCP
arguments.description: Enable Multipath TCP for connections

arguments.name: Negotiate Auth
arguments.description: Use Negotiate (SPNEGO) authentication

arguments.name: Netrc
arguments.description: Use ~/.netrc for login credentials

arguments.name: Netrc File
arguments.description: Specify netrc file path

arguments.name: Netrc Optional
arguments.description: Use netrc file if available, but not required

arguments.name: Next
arguments.description: Use separate operation for next URL with reset options

arguments.name: No ALPN
arguments.description: Disable ALPN TLS extension

arguments.name: No Buffer
arguments.description: Disable buffering of output stream

arguments.name: No Clobber
arguments.description: Do not overwrite existing files on output

arguments.name: No Keepalive
arguments.description: Disable TCP keepalive messages

arguments.name: No NPN
arguments.description: Disable NPN TLS extension (no-op since curl never uses NPN)

arguments.name: No Progress Meter
arguments.description: Switch off progress meter without suppressing other messages

arguments.name: No Session ID
arguments.description: Disable SSL session-ID caching

arguments.name: No Proxy
arguments.description: Comma-separated list of hosts to bypass proxy

arguments.name: NTLM Auth
arguments.description: Use NTLM authentication

arguments.name: NTLM WB
arguments.description: Deprecated: NTLM authentication via winbind helper

arguments.name: OAuth2 Bearer
arguments.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer Token for authentication

arguments.name: Out Null
arguments.description: Discard all response output silently

arguments.name: Output
arguments.description: Write output to file instead of stdout

arguments.name: Output Dir
arguments.description: Directory to store output files

arguments.name: Parallel
arguments.description: Perform all transfers in parallel

arguments.name: Parallel Immediate
arguments.description: Open more parallel connections immediately

arguments.name: Parallel Max
arguments.description: Maximum simultaneous parallel transfers

arguments.name: Parallel Max Host
arguments.description: Max concurrent connections per host in parallel mode

arguments.name: Pass
arguments.description: Passphrase for private key (TLS/SCP/SFTP)

arguments.name: Path As Is
arguments.description: Do not normalize /../ or /./ sequences in URL path

arguments.name: Pinned Public Key
arguments.description: Public key file or sha256 hashes to verify peer

arguments.name: Post 301
arguments.description: Keep POST method after 301 redirect

arguments.name: Post 302
arguments.description: Keep POST method after 302 redirect

arguments.name: Post 303
arguments.description: Keep POST method after 303 redirect

arguments.name: Pre Proxy
arguments.description: SOCKS proxy to use before connecting to HTTP(S) proxy

arguments.name: Progress Bar
arguments.description: Show transfer progress as simple progress bar

arguments.name: Proto
arguments.description: Limit allowed protocols for transfers

arguments.name: Proto Default
arguments.description: Default protocol for URLs without a scheme

arguments.name: Proto Redir
arguments.description: Limit allowed protocols on redirects

arguments.name: Proxy
arguments.description: Use specified proxy server

arguments.name: Proxy Any Auth
arguments.description: Automatically pick best proxy authentication method

arguments.name: Proxy Basic Auth
arguments.description: Use HTTP Basic authentication with proxy

arguments.name: Proxy CA Native
arguments.description: Use OS native CA store for HTTPS proxy verification

arguments.name: Proxy CA Cert
arguments.description: CA certificate file for HTTPS proxy verification

arguments.name: Proxy CA Path
arguments.description: CA certificate directory for HTTPS proxy verification

arguments.name: Proxy Cert
arguments.description: Client certificate for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Cert Type
arguments.description: Type of client certificate for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Ciphers
arguments.description: Cipher suites for HTTPS proxy TLS 1.2 connection

arguments.name: Proxy CRL File
arguments.description: CRL file for HTTPS proxy certificate revocation

arguments.name: Proxy Digest Auth
arguments.description: Use HTTP Digest authentication with proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Header
arguments.description: Extra header for proxy communication

arguments.name: Proxy HTTP2
arguments.description: Negotiate HTTP/2 with HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Insecure
arguments.description: Skip SSL certificate verification for proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Key
arguments.description: Private key file for HTTPS proxy client certificate

arguments.name: Proxy Key Type
arguments.description: Type of private key for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Negotiate
arguments.description: Use Negotiate (SPNEGO) authentication with proxy

arguments.name: Proxy NTLM
arguments.description: Use NTLM authentication with proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Pass
arguments.description: Passphrase for HTTPS proxy private key

arguments.name: Proxy Pinned Public Key
arguments.description: Public key or hashes to verify proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Service Name
arguments.description: Service name for SPNEGO proxy authentication

arguments.name: Proxy SSL Allow Beast
arguments.description: Do not work around BEAST TLS flaw for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy SSL Auto Client Cert
arguments.description: Auto-select client certificate for HTTPS proxy (Schannel)

arguments.name: Proxy TLS 1.3 Ciphers
arguments.description: Cipher suites for HTTPS proxy TLS 1.3 connection

arguments.name: Proxy TLS Auth Type
arguments.description: TLS authentication type for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy TLS Password
arguments.description: Password for TLS authentication with HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy TLS User
arguments.description: Username for TLS authentication with HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy TLS v1
arguments.description: Use at least TLS 1.0 for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy User
arguments.description: Username and password for proxy authentication

arguments.name: Proxy 1.0
arguments.description: Use specified HTTP 1.0 proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Tunnel
arguments.description: Tunnel traffic through HTTP proxy using CONNECT

arguments.name: Public Key
arguments.description: Public key filename for SFTP/SCP

arguments.name: Quote
arguments.description: Send arbitrary FTP/SFTP command before transfer

arguments.name: Random File
arguments.description: Deprecated: file with random data to seed SSL engine

arguments.name: Range
arguments.description: Retrieve byte range from server (e.g. 0-499)

arguments.name: Rate
arguments.description: Maximum transfer start rate (e.g. 2/s, 3/h, 14/m)

arguments.name: Raw
arguments.description: Disable HTTP decoding of content/transfer encodings

arguments.name: Referer
arguments.description: Set the HTTP Referer header

arguments.name: Remote Header Name
arguments.description: Use server-specified Content-Disposition filename

arguments.name: Remote Name
arguments.description: Write output to file named like the remote file

arguments.name: Remote Name All
arguments.description: Use --remote-name behavior for all URLs

arguments.name: Remote Time
arguments.description: Set local file timestamp to match remote file

arguments.name: Remove on Error
arguments.description: Remove output file if transfer error occurs

arguments.name: Request Method
arguments.description: Custom request method to use

arguments.name: Request Target
arguments.description: Use alternative target path in HTTP request

arguments.name: Resolve
arguments.description: Custom address for specific host:port pair

arguments.name: Retry
arguments.description: Number of retries on transient errors

arguments.name: Retry All Errors
arguments.description: Retry on any error (use with --retry)

arguments.name: Retry Conn Refused
arguments.description: Also retry on ECONNREFUSED

arguments.name: Retry Delay
arguments.description: Seconds to wait between retries

arguments.name: Retry Max Time
arguments.description: Maximum total time for retries in seconds

arguments.name: SASL Auth ID
arguments.description: Authorization identity for SASL PLAIN authentication

arguments.name: SASL IR
arguments.description: Enable initial response in SASL authentication

arguments.name: Service Name
arguments.description: Service name for SPNEGO authentication

arguments.name: Show Error
arguments.description: Show error messages even when --silent is used

arguments.name: Show Headers
arguments.description: Show response headers in output

arguments.name: Sig Algs
arguments.description: Specific TLS signature algorithms to use

arguments.name: Silent
arguments.description: Suppress progress meter, warnings, and error messages

arguments.name: Skip Existing
arguments.description: Skip download if local file already exists

arguments.name: SOCKS4 Proxy
arguments.description: Use SOCKS4 proxy (resolves hostname locally)

arguments.name: SOCKS4a Proxy
arguments.description: Use SOCKS4a proxy (proxy resolves hostname)

arguments.name: SOCKS5 Proxy
arguments.description: Use SOCKS5 proxy (resolves hostname locally)

arguments.name: SOCKS5 Basic Auth
arguments.description: Force username/password auth for SOCKS5

arguments.name: SOCKS5 GSS-API
arguments.description: Use GSS-API authentication for SOCKS5

arguments.name: SOCKS5 GSS-API NEC
arguments.description: Allow unprotected GSS-API protection mode negotiation

arguments.name: SOCKS5 GSS-API Service
arguments.description: Service name for SOCKS5 GSS-API authentication

arguments.name: SOCKS5 Hostname Proxy
arguments.description: Use SOCKS5 proxy (proxy resolves hostname)

arguments.name: Speed Limit
arguments.description: Minimum transfer speed in bytes/sec before aborting

arguments.name: Speed Time
arguments.description: Seconds below speed limit before aborting transfer

arguments.name: SSL
arguments.description: Try to use SSL/TLS (STARTTLS) for connection

arguments.name: SSL Allow Beast
arguments.description: Do not work around BEAST TLS 1.0 flaw

arguments.name: SSL Auto Client Cert
arguments.description: Auto-locate and use client certificate (Schannel)

arguments.name: SSL No Revoke
arguments.description: Disable certificate revocation checks (Schannel)

arguments.name: SSL Required
arguments.description: Require SSL/TLS for the connection

arguments.name: SSL Revoke Best Effort
arguments.description: Ignore revocation check failures from missing/offline CRL

arguments.name: SSL Sessions
arguments.description: Experimental: file to load/save SSL session tickets

arguments.name: SSLv2
arguments.description: Deprecated: previously requested SSLv2

arguments.name: SSLv3
arguments.description: Deprecated: previously requested SSLv3

arguments.name: Stderr
arguments.description: Redirect stderr output to file

arguments.name: Styled Output
arguments.description: Enable bold font styles for HTTP headers in terminal

arguments.name: Suppress Connect Headers
arguments.description: Do not output proxy CONNECT response headers

arguments.name: TCP Fast Open
arguments.description: Enable TCP Fast Open

arguments.name: TCP No Delay
arguments.description: Enable TCP_NODELAY option (disable Nagle algorithm)

arguments.name: Telnet Option
arguments.description: Pass option to telnet protocol

arguments.name: TFTP Block Size
arguments.description: TFTP BLKSIZE option (minimum 512)

arguments.name: TFTP No Options
arguments.description: Do not send TFTP options requests

arguments.name: Time Cond
arguments.description: Request file modified before or after given date/time

arguments.name: TLS Early Data
arguments.description: Enable TLSv1.3 early data (0-RTT)

arguments.name: TLS Max Version
arguments.description: Maximum allowed TLS version

arguments.name: TLS 1.3 Ciphers
arguments.description: Cipher suites to use for TLS 1.3

arguments.name: TLS Auth Type
arguments.description: TLS authentication type (e.g. SRP)

arguments.name: TLS Password
arguments.description: Password for TLS authentication

arguments.name: TLS User
arguments.description: Username for TLS authentication

arguments.name: TLS v1
arguments.description: Use at least TLS version 1.0

arguments.name: TLS v1.0
arguments.description: Force TLS version 1.0 or later

arguments.name: TLS v1.1
arguments.description: Force TLS version 1.1 or later

arguments.name: TLS v1.2
arguments.description: Force TLS version 1.2 or later

arguments.name: TLS v1.3
arguments.description: Force TLS version 1.3 or later

arguments.name: TR Encoding
arguments.description: Request compressed Transfer-Encoding response

arguments.name: Trace
arguments.description: Save full trace dump to file (use - for stdout, % for stderr)

arguments.name: Trace ASCII
arguments.description: Save ASCII-only trace dump to file

arguments.name: Trace Config
arguments.description: Set trace components to enable (comma-separated)

arguments.name: Trace IDs
arguments.description: Prepend transfer/connection IDs to trace output

arguments.name: Trace Time
arguments.description: Prepend timestamp to trace output

arguments.name: Unix Socket
arguments.description: Connect through Unix domain socket instead of network

arguments.name: Upload File
arguments.description: Upload local file to remote URL

arguments.name: Upload Flags
arguments.description: IMAP flags for uploaded files (comma-separated)

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: Explicitly specify a URL to fetch or send data to

arguments.name: URL Query
arguments.description: Add data to URL query string with URL-encoding

arguments.name: Use ASCII
arguments.description: Enable ASCII transfer mode for FTP/LDAP/TFTP

arguments.name: User
arguments.description: Username and password for server authentication

arguments.name: User Agent
arguments.description: User-Agent string to send to HTTP server

arguments.name: Variable
arguments.description: Set a command line variable (name=value or name@file)

arguments.name: Verbose
arguments.description: Output verbose information during operation

arguments.name: Version
arguments.description: Display curl and libcurl version information

arguments.name: VLAN Priority
arguments.description: Set VLAN priority (IEEE 802.1Q, range 0-7)

arguments.name: Write Out
arguments.description: Display information after transfer using format string

arguments.name: XAttr
arguments.description: Store file metadata in extended file attributes
